title: Build a Reusable Input Library
description: Extract your Day 02 login inputs into a small design-system-style library. Refactor the login page to compose these primitives — same behavior, less duplication. Practice map for field configs and keys for error lists.
requirements: Create TextInput with label, value, onChange, error message, and optional id/name props
Create PasswordInput with show/hide toggle reusing TextInput patterns or shared wrapper
Create Checkbox with label, checked, and onChange
Create Button with variant (primary/secondary), isLoading, disabled, and children for label text
Create ErrorMessage or FormError component for inline and summary errors
Define a shared BaseFieldProps or similar TypeScript interface extended by field components
Refactor Day 02 LoginForm to use the library — validation and loading behavior unchanged
Render validation error list or field config array using map() with stable keys
Organize components under src/components/ui/ with one component per file
acceptanceCriteria: Login page works identically to Day 02 after refactor
No copy-pasted <input> markup in LoginForm — only library components
Each list render uses key from stable id, not index (unless static order)
TypeScript props are typed on every exported component
Button shows loading state and disables during simulated login
Password show/hide still works through PasswordInput
npm run build passes without errors
hints: Start by copying one input from Day 02 into TextInput — get one field working before extracting others.
Use children on Button: <Button isLoading={loading}>{loading ? 'Signing in…' : 'Sign in'}</Button>.
Define a fields config array: { id, label, type }[] and map to components only if it simplifies LoginForm — do not over-abstract.
FieldError can accept message?: string and render nothing when undefined.
Share className logic in one wrapper; pass ...rest to native input for aria attributes.

bonus.title: Fieldset composition
bonus.description: Practice children for layout without new React APIs.
requirements: Create FormField wrapper that renders label, children slot for input, and error below
Use FormField in TextInput and PasswordInput
Add Storybook-style demo page listing all components (static, no router needed)

debuggingScenarios.title: Missing key
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique key prop
debuggingScenarios.cause: map() returns elements without key, or key is on wrong element
debuggingScenarios.fix: Add key={item.id} on the outermost element in the map callback return

debuggingScenarios.title: Wrong list rendering
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Errors show under wrong fields or list is empty when errors exist
debuggingScenarios.cause: Mapping wrong array, using filter incorrectly, or key/index mismatch after reorder
debuggingScenarios.fix: Verify you map errors aligned with field ids; use filter(Boolean) on message strings before render

debuggingScenarios.title: Duplicate components
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Fixing label styling requires editing five files
debuggingScenarios.cause: Copied input JSX into each form instead of using shared TextInput
debuggingScenarios.fix: Extract shared markup to ui/TextInput; forms only pass props
